bullets: Prioritized reliability and trust for mobile money and payment workflows supporting 10M+ monthly transactions.
Improved payment product engagement to 83% and CSAT to 94% through targeting, segmentation, and multichannel integration.
Owned MVP strategy for core B2B platform modules, onboarding 15+ paying customers within six months.
Built roadmap governance across cross-functional teams, improving delivery velocity 3x and reducing release cycles 50%.
Improved platform throughput 15% and release speed 2x through architecture and DevOps maturity work.
Owned zero-to-one platform product strategy that generated Rs. 1M+ ARR through pricing, packaging, and upsell design.
Connected AI/ML personalization to platform readiness, contributing to +25% engagement and +20% MRR growth.
Reduced development cost 25% and improved time-to-market 15% through roadmap prioritization discipline.
Improved customer feedback systems and CSAT by 15%, strengthening customer confidence loops.
headings: Product Manager | Payments, Reliability & Trust-Centered Platforms
Lead Product Manager - Logix Built Solutions Limited | 2025-05 to Present
